dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Okay! Take this and put it inside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ksiko Kiko Kiko Kiko Kiko Kiko Kiko

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oooooh!! It's moving!! this is so fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Takohach!! Why are you deciding this!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aw, man, you're a local? Well, shoot.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Strawhat, when you first got here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why did you fall back down?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wanted to go even higher.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when you leave the area,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The resin can't maintain its shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But... I don't really get it, so...
